starters.name: Tomato Soup
starters.description: Creamy tomato soup served with croutons. Contains dairy, gluten-free option available.

starters.name: Garlic Bread
starters.description: Toasted baguette slices topped with butter and garlic herb spread. Contains gluten and dairy.

mains.name: House Burger
mains.description: Grilled beef patty with lettuce, tomato, and house sauce on a brioche bun. Served with fries. Contains gluten.

mains.name: Caesar Salad
mains.description: Romaine lettuce tossed in Caesar dressing with parmesan cheese and croutons. Contains dairy and fish.

mains.name: Grilled Salmon
mains.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon fillet grilled and served with seasonal vegetables.

mains.name: Pasta Marinara
mains.description: Spaghetti tossed in tomato marinara sauce topped with fresh basil. Vegan, contains gluten.

desserts.name: Chocolate Cake
desserts.description: Rich double chocolate cake slice served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream. Contains dairy, gluten, and eggs.

desserts.name: Vanilla Ice Cream
desserts.description: Two scoops of vanilla bean ice cream. Contains dairy.

drinks.name: Coffee
drinks.description: Freshly brewed house blend coffee. Available hot or iced.

drinks.name: Soda
drinks.description: Choice of cola, lemon-lime, or orange soda.
